settings.setting: PIN Required to Watch Restricted Content

technicalRecon.subtitle: Google Cloud Platform infrastructure with standard web application architecture

apiArchitecture.title: Standard Web Application (GCP/GKE)
apiArchitecture.description: Paramount+ runs on Google Cloud Platform with Google Kubernetes Engine (GKE) as the orchestration layer. The platform uses a standard web application architecture with server-rendered pages for account management and API calls for content delivery. Video manifests are served through legacy thePlatform/MPX infrastructure (link.theplatform.com). Multi-CDN strategy uses CloudFront, Akamai, Fastly, and Google Edge. No public API is available. The SlyGuy Kodi addon has reverse-engineered content playback APIs but not account management endpoints.

codeExample.exampleComment: // Parental controls are managed through the web UI only

endpoints.purpose: Account settings and parental controls (web UI)
Brand hub pages (Nickelodeon, CBS, MTV, etc.)

authDetails.label: Primary Auth
authDetails.description: Standard cookie-based sessions set at login. No proprietary protocol (no MSL, no Falcor).

authDetails.label: Cloud Protection
authDetails.description: Web Application Firewall providing bot detection, DDoS protection, and request filtering.

authDetails.label: Video Delivery
authDetails.description: Legacy Comcast Technology Solutions infrastructure for video manifest delivery. Used by SlyGuy Kodi addon.

authDetails.label: CDN Auth
authDetails.description: CloudFront, Akamai, Fastly, and Google Edge CDN with signed URLs for video streams.

rateLimitNotes: Google Cloud Armor WAF handles request filtering and bot detection
No aggressive anti-automation measures documented (less hostile than Netflix)
CAPTCHA may appear on login under suspicious conditions
Session cookies last for an estimated 1-4 weeks before re-authentication required
Multi-CDN architecture distributes load across CloudFront, Akamai, Fastly, and Google Edge
SlyGuy Kodi addon operates successfully, suggesting moderate anti-bot enforcement
technicalRecon.harCaptureCount: 7 key endpoint patterns identified via research

tosWarning.title: Paramount+ Terms of Use -- Automated Access
tosWarning.description: Paramount+ Terms of Use explicitly prohibit use of 'any robot, bot, scraper, site search/retrieval application, proxy, VPN or other manual or automatic device, method, system or process to access, retrieve, index, data mine, or in any way reproduce or circumvent the navigational structure or presentation of the Service.' No public API or partner program exists for third-party parental control integration.

overallRisk.description: comparable to Peacock -- manageable with stealth browser automation and rate limiting. Google Cloud Armor is less aggressive than Netflix's custom detection stack.

detectionVectors.mitigation: Use Playwright stealth plugin (playwright-extra) to mask automation signals
Respect rate limits; use consistent browser fingerprint; avoid rapid sequential requests
Monitor for CAPTCHA challenges; implement solver or user-assisted flow if needed
Maintain persistent browser profile and cookies across sessions
Randomize delays between actions; follow natural page flow
Batch changes in single sessions; add jitter between actions

mitigationsChecklist: Enable Playwright stealth mode for all browser sessions
Cache session cookies aggressively to minimize login frequency
Implement exponential backoff on retry logic
Add human-like random delays (2-8s) between navigation steps
Maintain persistent browser profiles to avoid new-device triggers
Monitor for CAPTCHA or challenge responses and alert on detection
Batch parental control changes into single password-verified sessions
Track Paramount+ platform migration timeline (Skydance merger) for potential breaking changes

stats.label: Phosra-Added
stats.color: bg-green-100 text-green-700 dark:bg-green-900/30 dark:text-green-300 ring-1 ring-green-300 dark:ring-green-700

gapOpportunities.title: Screen Time Limits
gapOpportunities.gap: Paramount+ has ZERO screen time controls. No native way for parents to restrict daily viewing hours, despite hosting extensive Nickelodeon kids content alongside TV-MA Showtime originals.
gapOpportunities.solution: Phosra monitors Continue Watching data via periodic Playwright scrapes. When the daily limit is reached, the child's profile access is restricted by changing the account-wide parental controls PIN to a Phosra-managed value. NOTE: This affects all profiles on the account, not just the target child.

gapOpportunities.title: Activity Alerts
gapOpportunities.gap: Paramount+ sends no parent alerts. Parents have no visibility into what their child watches. No real-time notifications, no weekly reports, no email summaries.
gapOpportunities.solution: Phosra periodically scrapes Continue Watching data and pushes notifications to parents when new content appears or unusual viewing patterns are detected.

gapOpportunities.title: Bedtime Mode
gapOpportunities.gap: Paramount+ has no time-of-day restrictions. Children can watch Nickelodeon content, live CBS sports, or attempt to access Showtime content at any hour.
gapOpportunities.solution: Phosra locks and unlocks profile access on a parent-defined schedule via cron-triggered PIN changes. Profile access is toggled to enforce bedtime windows. NOTE: Account-wide PIN change affects all users.

gapOpportunities.title: Per-Title Blocking
gapOpportunities.gap: Paramount+ does NOT support per-title blocking. Parents cannot block specific shows like South Park while allowing other content at the same rating level. The only mechanism is the account-wide rating slider.
gapOpportunities.solution: No direct workaround available. Phosra can alert parents about specific content their child has watched and recommend adjusting the rating slider, but cannot selectively block individual titles.

integrationGap.apiDescription: Playwright-only (no known API for account management)

steps.title: Monitor
steps.detail: Scrape Continue Watching carousel via Playwright every 30-60 min. Extract title names and progress indicators per profile.

steps.title: Detect
steps.detail: Compare current Continue Watching state against previous snapshot. New entries or progress changes indicate active viewing. NOTE: No timestamps or durations available -- detection is based on state changes only.

steps.title: Lock
steps.detail: Change account-wide parental controls PIN to a Phosra-generated value via Playwright automation of web settings. CAUTION: This affects ALL users on the account, not just the target child.

steps.title: Notify
steps.detail: Push notification to parent via Phosra app with viewing summary and lock confirmation. Include list of titles watched and any content rating concerns.

limitations.title: 30-60 min polling delay
limitations.description: Continue Watching data is scraped via Playwright, not queried via API. Polling interval is 30-60 minutes. Children may overshoot limits significantly before detection.

limitations.title: No Paramount+ API
limitations.description: All operations (reads AND writes) require Playwright browser automation. No internal API for account settings has been documented. Higher resource cost per operation than Netflix (which has Shakti API for reads).

limitations.title: Account-wide PIN affects all users
limitations.description: The parental controls PIN is account-wide. Changing it to lock one child's access also locks out other family members from PIN-gated content and profile switching.

limitations.title: Live TV is all-or-nothing
limitations.description: The Live TV PIN lock is a binary toggle. There is no per-channel or per-rating granularity. Blocking a child from watching live CBS News also blocks live NFL games.

limitations.title: No per-title blocking
limitations.description: Paramount+ does not support blocking individual titles. South Park (TV-MA) and PAW Patrol (TV-Y) can only be separated by rating tier, not individually.

enforcementFlow.loopLabel: Repeats daily until parent adjusts limits

methods.name: authenticate
methods.recommendation: Use stealth mode. Cache session cookies. No MFA handling needed (simpler than Netflix).

methods.name: listProfiles
methods.recommendation: Scrape profile picker page. Extract names, types, and Kids tier.

methods.name: getProfileSettings
methods.recommendation: Scrape account settings page. Read parental controls state, rating slider, live TV lock.

methods.name: setContentRestrictions
methods.recommendation: Playwright via web settings. Requires password entry. Account-wide slider (4 tiers + live TV toggle).

methods.name: setTitleRestrictions
methods.recommendation: Paramount+ does not support per-title blocking. Return UnsupportedOperationError.

methods.name: setProfilePIN
methods.recommendation: Playwright via web account settings. PIN is 4-digit numeric, account-wide. Password required for changes.

methods.name: getWatchHistory
methods.recommendation: Scrape Continue Watching carousel. Data is very sparse: title + progress only. No dates, no durations.

methods.name: lockProfile
methods.recommendation: Change account-wide PIN. Store original PIN for restore. CAUTION: Affects ALL users. Recommend device-level controls instead.

methods.name: createKidsProfile
methods.recommendation: Playwright with Kids Mode toggle + age tier selection. Verify profile count < 6 before attempting.

methods.name: supportsNativeScreenTime
methods.recommendation: Returns false. Paramount+ has zero native screen time features. Autoplay OFF by default on Kids profiles.
